腦洞提議，希望在活動中造成特殊規則的關卡造物保留起來集中成一個教學館之類的，平常可以自選環境為星辰篇或忘卻篇、追加哪些造物條件，且自選隊伍編成，當作兼具娛樂和研究性質的花式關卡，方便玩家研發玩法，或只是閒著沒事的時候體驗一下不同規則的樂趣。這次打貓的關卡有種打贏很容易但要贏得優雅流暢大連招要動點腦的感覺，感覺長草期有些腦力激盪關卡也不錯⋯⋯或者只是欣賞一下各種操作也不錯⋯⋯

hi lyra, does the team have any plans on this? <:nocomment:1356053106038673610>
Devs want money. That's my bet.

And honestly with the silver prime convergence. Light though it would be a sufficient trade off.

But now I'm just theorising

obviously, but they apologized last time and separated the banners. I just expected more after all those promises of improved communication etc. I used to give BIAV the benefit of the doubt, but for a celebration event, this is shattering all my goodwill. I'm quite a 🐳 myself, but I still need good value to spend. So since my Pollux is +12 already, I will not whale for his wheel on this kind of banner, simple as that. The community discourages any new player to pull more than a single character copy - or even at all if not wheel & character are really good - that can't be more profitable than "get 4 mouchette copies".... No, really super disappointed, they know they can do better and keep screwing up.

idk what is the team doing tbh, if anything this half anni has the most pay 2 win packs / quests to date

mid - high spenders won’t have an issue since they have sliver conversion 

but for new players this entire anni is either a trap to make them impulsively spend (which i highly detest this extent of monetisation) or not spend at all after witness all the drama on shitty daily banner, 300 pure core upgrade, ethereal cores in paid packs
and morimens staff being selectively silent is also not a good look either for their work ethic and reputation

Imho as a relative newbie (less than 2 months played) who reinstalled around a month ago, these rerun banners leave the biggest sour note in my mouth. 

I'm the type of person to go for max constellations on a unit I really like, and not only does this banner structure *not* give me time to keep pumping out pulls from content to use, but it also forces me to end up whaling on something I do not wish to get: copies of the wheel of destiny. And to make things worse, since I want a unit that's before Saya's story full release, I simply don't get 150 of the Anni's 250 promised pulls to use for my character. Like... what?

Granted, I'm not that big of a spender so I suppose my input is of not much value in the grand scheme of things, but I came into the Anni expecting to spend 50 or more euro and now feel like I shouldn't spend a dime.
